title: Azure AI Engineer (AI-102)
longDescription: Passed the Microsoft Azure AI Engineer Associate (AI-102) certification. Covers building, managing, and deploying AI solutions using Azure Cognitive Services, Azure AI Search, and Azure OpenAI.

title: 4th Place Nationals
longDescription: Placed 4th nationally in Serbia's Junior -105kg powerlifting category. Years of training, discipline, and progressive overload translated into national-level competition.

title: Data Scientist at Vega IT
longDescription: Working on advanced AI projects at Vega IT in Belgrade. Mentoring junior data scientists and developing AI learning labs for high school students.
